# PHIL.082 ? Communitarianism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** communitarianism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Community over individual; situated self; common good; tradition and practice; critique of abstract individualism

## Application
Prioritize communal good; recognize social embeddedness; value tradition; common goods; situated moral reasoning

## Key Values
- Community
- Common good
- Social embeddedness
- Tradition

## Tags
philosophy, contemporary, communitarianism
